name: sys_network_ports
details:
NAME
sys_network_ports() - 显示活动的网络端口

SYNOPSIS
mixed *sys_network_ports(void);

DESCRIPTION
Returns an array of arrays; one for each network port that is being actively used.
   说明：2023年6月1日 commit 181308d 新增Efun。

RETURN VALUES
An array of the following sub-array will be returned with each active port:

       ({ (string) type, (int) port, (int) tls, })

SEE ALSO
network_stats(3)
